'''mazovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaastu|vaastu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaastu|vaastu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mazovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzeveth|mæzeveth]] || [[word:mæzevej|mæzevej]] || [[word:mæzevesh|mæzevesh]] || [[word:mæzeve|mæzeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazozovoth|mazozovoth]] || [[word:mazozovoj|mazozovoj]] || [[word:mazozovosh|mazozovosh]] || [[word:mazozovo|mazozovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazovoth|mazovoth]] || [[word:mazovoj|mazovoj]] || [[word:mazovosh|mazovosh]] || [[word:mazovo|mazovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazofvoth|mazofvoth]] || [[word:mazofvoj|mazofvoj]] || [[word:mazofvosh|mazofvosh]] || [[word:mazofvof|mazofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazovotho|mazovotho]] || [[word:mazovojo|mazovojo]] || [[word:mazovosho|mazovosho]] || [[word:mazovoko|mazovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazovoth|mazovoth]] || [[word:mazovoj|mazovoj]] || [[word:mazovosh|mazovosh]] || [[word:mazovo|mazovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazovothol|mazovothol]] || [[word:mazovojol|mazovojol]] || [[word:mazovoshol|mazovoshol]] || [[word:mazovokol|mazovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazovothotho|mazovothotho]] || [[word:mazovojojo|mazovojojo]] || [[word:mazovoshosho|mazovoshosho]] || [[word:mazovoko|mazovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazovothon|mazovothon]] || [[word:mazovojon|mazovojon]] || [[word:mazovoshon|mazovoshon]] || [[word:mazovokon|mazovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazovothoro|mazovothoro]] || [[word:mazovojoro|mazovojoro]] || [[word:mazovoshoro|mazovoshoro]] || [[word:mazovokoro|mazovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
